modification_notice: Extracted complete Simplified Chinese sentences from the checksum-pinned PDF with pypdf 5.9.0, applied Unicode NFC and conservative PDF-whitespace normalization, removed exact within-source duplicates, and added input-only candidate metadata; headings, fragments, and converter output were excluded, and no expected text was used.
known_biases: Translated U.S. public-health guidance is not representative of ordinary Taiwan product traffic.
The document contains historical COVID-19 guidance published in 2021 and must not be treated as current medical advice.
PDF layout extraction is intentionally conservative and excludes headings and fragments.
Domain and conversion-risk labels remain unset until input-only review.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
